scope: Two-step provisional measurement of the 8xMI350 target-shape TorchTitan DSv4 canary without activation checkpointing, using the retained CE2/MORI routed-backward settings and no profiler.

comparison.read: Disabling activation checkpointing produces a real two-step no-profile throughput uplift and fits within MI350 memory on this short 4-layer canary observation, but robustness is not proven until a longer multi-step run completes. It is still only about 32.2% of the updated 277 TFLOPs/GPU target.

command: env TARGET_HOST=do-sonle5-mi350-gpu IMAGE=onenexus/nexus-titan:rocm722-pytorch-nightly-mori REMOTE_ROOT=/scratch/sonle5/dsv4_pretrain_canary_20260527 GPUS_PER_NODE=8 CANARY_EP=8 CANARY_GBS=128 CANARY_MBS=1 CANARY_SEQ_LEN=4096 CANARY_STEPS=2 CANARY_CHECKPOINT_ENABLE=false CANARY_ACTIVATION_CHECKPOINT_MODE=none CANARY_MOE_COMM_BACKEND=mori CANARY_EXPERIMENTAL_MORI_AITER_MOE=1 CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_MODE=routed CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_MODE=padded CANARY_MORI_AITER_LOCAL_VJP_SWIGLU_BACKEND=triton CANARY_MORI_AITER_OP_CACHE_MODE=backward CANARY_MORI_AITER_BACKWARD_COMBINE_INPUT_MODE=registered CANARY_MORI_AITER_BLOCK_NUM=64 CANARY_MORI_AITER_RDMA_BLOCK_NUM=32 CANARY_MORI_AITER_WARP_NUM_PER_BLOCK=8 CANARY_MORI_SHMEM_HEAP_SIZE=32G CANARY_REQUIRE_IDLE_GPUS=true CANARY_ENABLE_PROFILING=false RUN_ID=torchtitan_dsv4_ce2_noac_8x_s4096_gbs128_20260603 MASTER_PORT=29547 experiments/2026-05-27-deepseek-v4-amd-pretrain/launchers/torchtitan_direct_deepseek_v4_4x8xmi350_canary.sh run
